Characters by the powers they practice — one category per system.

; By system
* [[:Category:Sacred artists|Sacred artists — Cradle]]
* [[:Category:Travelers|Travelers — Traveler's Gate]]
* [[:Category:Readers|Readers — Elder Empire]]
* [[:Category:Soulbound|Soulbound — Elder Empire]]
* [[:Category:Mages|Mages — The Last Horizon]]

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Magic]]
